field_glossary.battalions: Current battalion count remaining in the brigade.
field_glossary.feba_km: Forward edge of battle movement/progress in kilometers within a contested hex.
field_glossary.last_combat: Combat summaries from the most recently resolved turn. Empty before any combat or if no contested hex produced combat.
field_glossary.last_contested_hexes: Hex IDs that were contested in the most recently resolved turn.
field_glossary.legal_commits: Authoritative adjacent support options by target hex and team.
field_glossary.legal_moves: Authoritative target hex lists by brigade and movement mode.
field_glossary.organization: 0-100 readiness value affected by movement and combat.
field_glossary.turn_result: Structured record of the turn just resolved (only populated when resolved=true): turn_number, contested_hexes, combat_summaries, phase summaries, and an ordered `events` log.

rules_summary.combat: After movement, any hex containing both Red and Green brigades is contested and resolves one combat round.
rules_summary.legal_actions: Use legal_moves and legal_commits from this observation. Do not invent brigade IDs or hex IDs.

movement.administrative: Longer range; costs all current organization and prevents commit support this turn.

rules_summary.randomness: Every end_turn action must include an explicit seed so runs are reproducible.
rules_summary.turn_model: WeGo: both sides submit orders during planning, then one deterministic resolver applies movement and combat.
